tactical_shape: Moved their block upfield in the second half and pressed more boldly
Played with a spirited, competitive underdog approach; lacked an effective striker and lively forwards beyond Tahith Chong
standout_players: Eloy Room made 15 saves against Ecuador earlier in the tournament; here he again prevented heavier damage
home_read.momentum: Leave their first World Cup with pride after competing well in most halves, but still need more quality in key attacking positions.

tactical_shape: Came through a 2-0 win in an imprecise contest
Leaned on wingers and quick transitions through Yan Diomande and Nicolas Pépé
At times declined to fully engage the wingers to close the game out
standout_players: Nicolas Pépé scored both goals, including a simple early finish and a curled second goal
Yan Diomande created the opener with pace and a cutback
Ibrahim Sangaré played Pépé through for the second goal
Amad Diallo was cited as one of the artistry/wing threats in the tournament context
away_read.momentum: Celebrate historic first World Cup knockout qualification, with a young, united group now looking to go further.
